events.label: assistant
events.text:
Assessment complete — written to `/app/answer.json`.

**Decision: fail (high risk)**. Missing window pan flashing at rough-complete stage is a non-compliant, defective installation under IRC R703.4 and standard manufacturer instructions, which require a sill pan to establish a drainage path before WRB/window integration. Work should stop until pan flashing (with back dam and end dams) is installed and properly shingle-lapped with the WRB, followed by re-inspection before proceeding to window set and finishes.
